coverage_model.direct_coverage_source: symbol_fixture_coverage symbols with fixture_sources containing fixture_json
coverage_model.isolated_coverage_source: symbol_fixture_coverage symbols with fixture_sources containing c_fixture_spec
coverage_model.mode_coverage_rule: strict_or_both and hardened_or_both both required for dual-mode coverage

replacement_level_rule.L2: blocked until standalone host-dependency evidence exists
replacement_level_rule.L3: blocked until cross-environment standalone evidence exists

gaps_requiring_fixture_beads.next_step: add direct+isolated dual-mode fixtures before advancing readiness claims

purpose: Per-family fixture coverage thresholds for exported symbol families. This artifact records current pass/fail decisions without hiding low-priority gaps.

threshold_policy.hard_parts_adjustment: hard-parts families require >=90% target, >=40% direct, >=20% isolated, >=20% dual-mode
threshold_policy.prioritizer_adjustment: top-5 or high-risk prioritizer families require at least 85% target and 15% dual-mode coverage
threshold_policy.small_family_adjustment: families with <=4 target symbols require 100% target coverage
threshold_policy.workload_adjustment: families blocking >=4 workloads require >=90% target and >=50% direct coverage
